review_limitations: Statischer GitHub-Web/Raw-Review; kein lokaler Clone/CI wegen DNS-Fehler in der Review-Umgebung.
Befunde basieren auf Masterprompt, Gameflow-Modulen, SL-Referenz, Spielerhandbuch, Kampagnenstruktur, Schema und QA-Smokes.

core_verdict.design_loop: HQ-only Deepsave -> neuer Chat -> Load-Router -> Abschnitt -> Debrief/Exit -> HQ -> Deepsave

tasks.title: Remove HQ save `phase: core` drift
tasks.problem: Speichermodul says HQ-Saves remain `phase: core`, which conflicts with the new HQ save anchor via continuity.last_seen.
tasks.expected_patch: Replace with: HQ saves do not persist runtime phase; canonical HQ anchor is continuity.last_seen.mode='hq' and location='HQ'. Mission type may appear only in logs.trace/summaries/runtime.
acceptance_tests: Saving after Core/Rift/Arena/Chronopolis exit produces continuity.last_seen.mode='hq'.
No root `phase: core` is used as HQ save decision field.
Load from HQ save opens HQ router, not half-open mission continuation.

tasks.title: Keep `campaign.mode` as campaign pool only
tasks.problem: Persistent schema text includes campaign.mode='rift', overloading campaign pool with mission type.
tasks.expected_patch: campaign.mode enum = mixed|preserve|trigger. Use runtime/trace mission_type or continuity.last_seen.mode for core/rift/arena/chronopolis.
acceptance_tests: Rift completion does not persist campaign.mode='rift'.
Arena exit restores mixed/preserve/trigger.
Chronopolis exit does not persist campaign.mode='chronopolis'.

tasks.title: Align classic start everywhere with Chargen-Save-Gate
tasks.problem: Some short modules still allow HQ tour or direct briefing after classic chargen, while Masterprompt requires HQ Heimkehr + save offer and no auto briefing.
tasks.expected_patch: Classic path: chargen -> HQ Heimkehrbeat -> Chargen-Save-Gate -> HQ menu. Fast-lane only: direct briefing, save after mission 1.
acceptance_tests: `Spiel starten (solo klassisch)` never jumps to briefing immediately after chargen.
`Spiel starten (gruppe klassisch)` ends in HQ save gate/lobby, not SC1.
`solo schnell` and `gruppe schnell` still jump to briefing by design.

tasks.title: Split tolerant import schema from strict export schema
tasks.problem: Schema is titled canonical export but allows additionalProperties and requires too few character/campaign fields.
tasks.expected_patch: Either create saveGame.v7.export.schema.json with strict required fields or rename current schema to import/normalizer helper.
acceptance_tests: Export lint fails if characters[].level_history is missing.
Export lint fails if campaign.rift_seeds is missing.
Import schema remains tolerant for legacy/partial saves if separate.

tasks.title: Fix `Level 5` Rift trigger to `Px 5`
tasks.problem: A diagram/dev checklist still references Level 5 as seed trigger; canonical trigger is Paradoxon-Index Px 5.
acceptance_tests: Level 5 with Px<5 creates no seeds.
Px 5 at any level runs ClusterCreate().

tasks.title: Complete Arena persistent contract and mode reset
tasks.problem: Arena uses queue_state, previous_mode, match_policy, anti-grind counters etc., but compact schema/template only mentions small arena block. Legacy fallback resets previous_mode to preserve instead of mixed.
tasks.expected_patch: Define persistent vs transient arena fields; set previous_mode fallback to mixed; ensure completed/idle HQ save allowed, active/queue blocked.
acceptance_tests: Arena active save blocked with SaveGuard.
Arena completed HQ save allowed.
Reload after arena restores campaign.mode correctly.
First-win/diminishing counters survive if intended persistent.

tasks.title: Unify Rift seed cap rule
tasks.problem: Modern rule says no solo hard limit and merge cap 12; older text says up to two seeds may remain open.
tasks.expected_patch: Remove or soften max-two text; mechanical cap only applies at HQ merge with overflow handoff.
acceptance_tests: Solo save with 5 open seeds accepted.
Merge of >12 seeds caps and logs overflow.

tasks.title: Unify conflict flag naming
tasks.problem: Both logs.flags.continuity_conflicts[] and logs.flags.merge_conflicts[] appear as save/flag targets.
tasks.expected_patch: Choose one canonical flag field; recommended: continuity_conflicts[] in flags, merge_conflicts as trace event name only.
acceptance_tests: Multi-load wallet/rift/arena conflicts land in the chosen canonical flag field.
Trace event can be merge_conflicts but save flags are not duplicated under two names.

tasks.title: Clean Root vs Character compact save tree
tasks.problem: Compact profile lists root fields after 'Pro Character', which may cause nested economy/logs under characters[].
tasks.expected_patch: Separate Pro Character and Root sections explicitly.
acceptance_tests: Export sample has economy/logs/summaries/continuity/arc/ui at root only.
No characters[].economy or characters[].logs in generated save.

tasks.title: Fix Rift loot Relikt drift
tasks.problem: Kampagnenstruktur says Relikte Core-exclusive; SL loot matrix lists Relikte as Rift standard loot.
tasks.expected_patch: Rift standard loot: investigation files, para traces, experimental gear, research samples. Artifact only after Rift boss scene 10. Relikte remain Core/story loot.
acceptance_tests: Rift non-boss loot never generates Core-exclusive Relikt by default.
Rift boss can trigger artifact roll only at scene 10.

tasks.title: Decide UI action_mode persistence
tasks.problem: action_mode=uncut is referenced as persistent/default in SL/runtime text but absent from master v7 UI template/schema required fields.
tasks.expected_patch: Either add ui.action_mode to v7 export or define it as runtime invariant not saved. Recommendation: persist it.
acceptance_tests: Load never loses uncut/action contract.
UI schema/template/reference agree on action_mode status.

tasks.title: Sharpen Chronopolis key/lore/savepoint contract
tasks.problem: Chronopolis is mostly correct, but one pitch says it is created by Kodex; key item vs flag should be decided.
tasks.expected_patch: Phrase as Kodex stabilizes/decrypts a real Bruchlinie/quantum resonance; no VR/simulation. Use level+flag+trace unlock unless key item is explicitly persisted.
acceptance_tests: Lvl9: locked. Lvl10: flag/trace unlock. Pre-City save allowed. CITY save blocked.
Chronopolis text never frames it as a Matrix/VR/server simulation.

tasks.title: Clarify group fast-lane smoke vs multi-load smoke
tasks.problem: `gruppe schnell -> 2 Saves + 1 Rolle -> Briefing` mixes new start and multi-load semantics.
tasks.expected_patch: Separate new group fast-lane from multiple JSON load/import test.
acceptance_tests: New `gruppe schnell` does roles/defaults/teamcheck -> briefing.
Multiple JSONs in first prompt triggers session anchor + join imports -> HQ router.

tasks.title: Mark legacy save prose in dice module as historical/migration-only
tasks.problem: Quick-Fight is fixed, but later save prose still mentions old version field style such as version 4.1.4.
tasks.expected_patch: Replace with v7 pointer or mark legacy prose as migration history only.
acceptance_tests: No player-facing current save instruction tells model to emit `version` instead of v/zr.

playtest_suites.title: Px5 to Rift debrief roundtrip
steps: Finish Core mission and reach Px5.
Run ClusterCreate, lock seeds until episode end, confirm px_state/reset.
Finish episode, save in HQ, new chat, load JSON.
Open Rift Board, launch open seed, play 14 scenes with boss no earlier than scene 10.
Exfil, Rift debrief, close seed, save in HQ, load new chat.

playtest_suites.title: Seed stacking and merge cap
steps: Create two solo saves with many open seeds

playtest_suites.title: Level gate and Pre-City save prompt
CITY saveguard and exit debrief
pass: Assets only if carried out alive

playtest_suites.title: Arena start, active save block, completed save
PvP anti-grind persistence
steps: Win matches vs same enemy type/tier

playtest_suites.title: Multiple real player saves as first message
steps: Paste 3 save JSONs in first prompt

playtest_suites.title: Solo NPC-team to real group
steps: Load solo save with NPC roster
pass: Roster echo appears in next two blocks

playtest_suites.title: Rift + Chronopolis + Arena branch merge
steps: Prepare branch A Rift, branch B Chronopolis, branch C Arena

recommended_next_action: Patch P0/P1 before large playtests; then run RiftOps -> Chronopolis -> PvP -> Cross-Mode-Merge.
